_comment: Runtime-only path overrides. Keep this file minimal and local.
_simulation_params_csv_comment: Optional STEP 1.1 input override. If null, use MINGO_DIGITAL_TWIN/SIMULATED_DATA/step_final_simulation_params.csv.

step_1_3._input_csv_comment: Optional STEP 1.3 input override. If null, STEP 1.3 uses STEP 1.2 transformed_feature_space.csv.

step_1_4._dictionary_csv_comment: Optional STEP 1.4 dictionary override. If null, STEP 1.4 uses STEP 1.3 OUTPUTS/FILES/dictionary.csv.
step_1_4._dataset_csv_comment: Optional STEP 1.4 dataset override. If null, STEP 1.4 uses STEP 1.3 OUTPUTS/FILES/dataset.csv.

step_3_1._source_csv_comment: Optional source-table override for STEP 3.1. If null, use source_table selection (dataset/dictionary defaults).
step_3_1._rate_dictionary_csv_comment: Optional dictionary used for global-rate contour/rate model in STEP 3.1.
step_3_1._eff_range_comment: Efficiency value range for STEP 3.1 generated eff_sim_* curves.
step_3_1._efficiency_spread_comment: Target max-min spread across eff_sim_1..4 along the generated curve (ignored when identical_efficiencies=true).

step_3_2._time_series_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.2 input override. If null, use STEP 3.1 OUTPUTS/FILES/time_series.csv.
step_3_2._complete_curve_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.2 input override. If null, use STEP 3.1 OUTPUTS/FILES/complete_curve.csv.
step_3_2._dictionary_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.2 dictionary override. If null, use STEP 1.4 OUTPUTS/FILES/dictionary.csv.
step_3_2._dataset_template_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.2 template override. If null, use STEP 1.1 OUTPUTS/FILES/dataset.csv.

step_3_3._synthetic_dataset_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 synthetic dataset override. If null, use STEP 3.2 OUTPUTS/FILES/synthetic_dataset.csv.
step_3_3._time_series_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 time-series override. If null, use STEP 3.1 OUTPUTS/FILES/time_series.csv.
step_3_3._complete_curve_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 complete-curve override. If null, use STEP 3.1 OUTPUTS/FILES/complete_curve.csv.
step_3_3._dictionary_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 dictionary override. If null, use STEP 1.4 OUTPUTS/FILES/dictionary.csv.
step_3_3._dataset_template_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 template override. If null, use STEP 1.1 OUTPUTS/FILES/dataset.csv.
step_3_3._uncertainty_lut_csv_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 uncertainty LUT override. If null, use STEP 2.3 OUTPUTS/FILES/uncertainty_lut.csv.
step_3_3._uncertainty_lut_meta_json_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 uncertainty LUT metadata override.
step_3_3._build_summary_json_comment: Optional STEP 3.3 STEP 1.3 build_summary override. If null, use STEP 1.3 OUTPUTS/FILES/build_summary.json.

step_4_1._dictionary_csv_comment: Optional STEP 4.1 dictionary override used for z-position consistency filtering and comparison columns.
step_4_1._build_summary_json_comment: Optional STEP 4.1 STEP 1.3 build_summary override. If null, use STEP 1.3 OUTPUTS/FILES/build_summary.json.

step_4_2._real_collected_csv_comment: Optional STEP 4.2 real-data input override. If null, use STEP 4.1 OUTPUTS/FILES/real_collected.csv.
step_4_2._dictionary_csv_comment: Optional STEP 4.2 dictionary override. If null, use STEP 1.4 OUTPUTS/FILES/dictionary.csv.
step_4_2._uncertainty_lut_csv_comment: Optional STEP 4.2 uncertainty LUT override. If null, use STEP 2.3 OUTPUTS/FILES/uncertainty_lut.csv.
step_4_2._uncertainty_lut_meta_json_comment: Optional STEP 4.2 uncertainty LUT metadata override.
step_4_2._build_summary_json_comment: Optional STEP 4.2 build_summary override. If null, use STEP 1.4 OUTPUTS/FILES/build_summary.json.
